prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约9245名→11816名→18728名→10891名→12013名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2023年出现明显后移（18728名），2024年大幅回升至10891名，2025年又回落至12013名，近两年波动较大，2025年基准约12013名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划2021年45人、2022年63人、2023年64人、2024年63人、2025年74人、2026年75人，2026年较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩招幅度约1.35%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 兰州大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第40名，近年排名稳定在38–40名区间，属于中上游985院校；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要源于硕士毕业生在论文致谢中感谢保卫部默许拾荒老人进校等人文关怀事件，正面舆情对报考热度有温和提振；抖音热度排名第53位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中等偏上水平，未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，草学A+、生态学A+、化学A-、地理学A-、生物学A-，共5个A类学科；草学与生态学为顶尖水平，化学、生物、地理等基础学科实力雄厚，与该校物理类招生的化学类、生物科学类、地理科学类等专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，兰州大学物理类招生涵盖计算机类、电子信息类、核工程等热门方向，对考生有一定吸引力；辽宁省2026年普通高考总人数约20万，按近年比例估算物理类约14.36万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争压力未明显变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12013名、2026年小幅扩招1人（+1.35%）、声誉偏正面、考生总数基本持平等因素，结合声誉正面信号及专业热度，预计2026年物理类最低位次较2025年略有后移；预测最低位次约12140名，区间11640–12640名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 9245 → 11816 → 18728 → 10891 → 12013, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; a significant backward shift occurred in 2023 (18728), followed by a large rebound to 10891 in 2024, and a drop to 12013 in 2025, with considerable fluctuations in recent two years, with a baseline of about 12013 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province Physics Category was 45 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 64 in 2023, 63 in 2024, 74 in 2025, and 75 in 2026, with a slight expansion of 1 student in 2026 compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 1.35%, which has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 40th on the main list, with stable rankings in the 38–40 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to humanities-related incidents such as master's graduates thanking the security department in their thesis acknowledgments for allowing elderly scrap collectors to enter the campus, which has a mild positive effect on application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranks 53rd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, and no obvious records of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Grass Science A+, Ecology A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-, totaling 5 A-class disciplines; Grass Science and Ecology are at the top level, while basic disciplines such as Chemistry, Biology, and Geography are strong, highly related to the Chemistry, Biological Science, and Geography Science majors in the university's Physics Category enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; Lanzhou University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular directions like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Nuclear Engineering, which attract some candidates; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 200,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 143,600 based on recent proportions, roughly the same as in 2025, with no significant change in competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12013, a slight expansion of 1 student in 2026 (+1.35%), a slightly positive reputation, and a basically unchanged total number of candidates, combined with positive reputation signals and major popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 12140, with a range of 11640–12640.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11640–12640, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 11500), prioritize Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Physics; for rankings close to the upper limit (e.g., beyond 12500), consider Tier 3 majors first to ensure admission.

学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 40th on the main list, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive; incidents such as graduate students thanking the Security Department in their acknowledgments have enhanced the university's image. Its Douyin popularity ranks 53rd (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure.
